stemHtml: Find the purpose of intermediate holding position markings on taxiways?

options.a: To ensure aircraft on adjacent taxiways remain clear of each other if one aircraft is holding.
options.b: To designate areas for aircraft parking between active taxiways.
options.c: To mark a point where all taxiing aircraft must stop, regardless of adjacent traffic.
options.d: To indicate the start of a restricted area where special clearance is required.
